title: CDDZ characters
description:
A fanmade mod that adds robots as mobs to the game.
Currently adds 3 mobs and 6 items.
Based on Clone drone in the danger zone and uses real voxel models from it.
Models by Doborog.
Thats it :)
body:
Immerse yourself in the cutting-edge world of Minecraft with the "CDDZ Characters" mod, inspired by Clone Drone in the Danger Zone. Currently in active development, this fan-made modification introduces a diverse array of robots as mobs. Created by the Doborog, these 3D models bring a futuristic flair to the game, from agile drones to towering automatons. Explore Minecraft's landscapes with a fresh challenge, knowing that ongoing updates will continually expand the roster of mobs and items. The mod promises an ever-evolving and thrilling experience for those seeking a futuristic twist to their Minecraft adventures.

## Current mobs and items:

<details>
<summary>Sword5</summary>

![An Sword5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1xDxLFoM/images/228d359fd81beeebc6848eaa1938db6f3fef2db5.png)

Spawns in any forest biome at night (except nether warped & crimson), have 15 hearts and decent speed, currently drops iron ingot when killed, in future updates it will drop armor pieces which would be used to craft armor.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Hostile Flame raptor</summary>

![An Hostile Flame raptor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1xDxLFoM/images/705d1a5d2a3ba4bfa4ba811cfea865b2818dfc1c.png)

Spawn in any plains biome at night, red eyes 10 hearts and very fast speed, shoots flame on sight at any player nearby, drops core parts that can be used for crafting weapon simillar to his attack.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Tamed Flame raptor</summary>

![Tamed Flame raptor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1xDxLFoM/images/688281e7cb892e668cb9c3b95b8ca8639c7e7c84.png)

Spawns in any plains biome at daylight, blue eyes 20 hearts and fast speed, can be riden by any player without saddle, can be tamed to protect player simillar to wolf, drops blaze rod when killed.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Core part</summary>

![Core part](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1xDxLFoM/images/30e019b354309f516ae8ab1c989fff764d1830df.png)

Drops from hostile flame raptors, can be used to craft flame breathe weapon.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Flame breathe</summary>

![Flame breathe recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1xDxLFoM/images/9f901bd539a8aa3b8c3623c3bbeee9454de408e8.png)

A weapon that shoots simillar to Flame raptor projectile, uses blaze powder as ammo, can be crafted with 4x core parts, 4x obsidian and 1 lava bucket

</details>
